_comment: Copy this file to config.json (git-ignored) and fill in real values. For deployments (Railway, CI) supply the same JSON in the MBBB_CONFIG_JSON env var instead. Sync reads config.json first, then MBBB_CONFIG_JSON.
_comment_deprioritize: Optional. When the same content appears in more than one folder, the copy in a folder whose name matches one of these (case-insensitive substring) patterns is NOT chosen as the canonical download — a normal song-folder copy wins. Use it for by-instrument re-index folders.

google._comment: Authentication is by Google service account only. The source folders are public, so no folder sharing is needed — the service account just provides Drive API credentials. Paste the JSON key Google Cloud gives you here, inline.
